exercises.sentence: Hoy yo ___ muy feliz con mi trabajo nuevo.
exercises.translation: Today I am very happy with my new job.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ estudiante de la universidad de Madrid.
exercises.translation: I am a student at the University of Madrid.

exercises.sentence: Normalmente, yo ___ la persona que prepara el desayuno.
exercises.translation: Normally, I am the person who prepares breakfast.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú el hermano de mi mejor amiga?
exercises.translation: Are you the brother of my best friend?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ una persona muy amable y simpática.
exercises.translation: You are a very kind and nice person.

exercises.sentence: ¿Cómo ___ tú hoy por la mañana?
exercises.translation: How are you today in the morning?

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ___ el responsable de organizar el evento.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I was the one responsible for organizing the event.

exercises.sentence: La semana pasada yo ___ el mejor jugador del equipo.
exercises.translation: Last week I was the best player on the team.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muy valiente durante la emergencia ayer.
exercises.translation: I was very brave during the emergency yesterday.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú el ganador de la competencia de baile?
exercises.translation: Were you the winner of the dance competition?

exercises.sentence: Anoche tú ___ muy generoso con tus invitados.
exercises.translation: Last night you were very generous with your guests.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ___ tú tan tímido en la fiesta de ayer?
exercises.translation: Why were you so shy at the party yesterday?

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ___ muy travieso en clase.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I was very mischievous in class.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo ___ fanático de la música rock.
exercises.translation: Before, I was a fan of rock music.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ una persona muy atlética cuando vivía en México.
exercises.translation: I was a very athletic person when I lived in Mexico.

exercises.sentence: Cuando tú ___ pequeño, vivías cerca de la playa.
exercises.translation: When you were small, you lived near the beach.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ muy inteligente cuando estudiabas en la secundaria.
exercises.translation: You were very intelligent when you studied in high school.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú paciente con los niños en ese tiempo?
exercises.translation: Were you patient with the children at that time?

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ más feliz si tuviera más tiempo libre.
exercises.translation: I would be happier if I had more free time.

exercises.sentence: En tu lugar, yo ___ muy cuidadoso con ese contrato.
exercises.translation: In your place, I would be very careful with that contract.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ un excelente guía turístico si conociera la ciudad.
exercises.translation: I would be an excellent tour guide if I knew the city.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú capaz de terminar el proyecto hoy mismo?
exercises.translation: Would you be capable of finishing the project today?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ un gran doctor si decidieras estudiar medicina.
exercises.translation: You would be a great doctor if you decided to study medicine.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú tan amable de ayudarme con este paquete?
exercises.translation: Would you be so kind as to help me with this package?

exercises.sentence: Algún día yo ___ un profesional muy reconocido.
exercises.translation: Someday I will be a very recognized professional.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muy cuidadoso con mi dinero el próximo año.
exercises.translation: I will be very careful with my money next year.

exercises.sentence: Seguramente yo ___ el primero en llegar a la reunión.
exercises.translation: Surely I will be the first to arrive at the meeting.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ una persona exitosa si sigues trabajando duro.
exercises.translation: You will be a successful person if you keep working hard.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú mi pareja de baile en el evento de mañana?
exercises.translation: Will you be my dance partner at the event tomorrow?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ un excelente padre para tus futuros hijos.
exercises.translation: You will be an excellent father to your future children.
